# Dentfluence — Locked Features Registry

This file is read by the pre-commit hook to protect completed features.
**Do NOT edit this file manually** unless you are intentionally locking/unlocking a feature.

To unlock a feature for editing, run:
```
bash scripts/unlock-feature.sh appointments
```

To re-lock after changes:
```
bash scripts/lock-feature.sh appointments
```

---
